subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab and others, spoken on 1914-11-28
subcodes.first_line: In this Dispensation all the ties of physical relationship are broken and should play no part in passing judgment over one's character. Not the one who is related to me but the one who doeth the will of Bahá'u'lláh is of me and related to me.
subcodes.subjects: @humility; meekness; lowliness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
